title: ICCAT Southern Atlantic Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation
text:
This site hosts the materials for the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE) process for South Atlantic albacore tuna (Thunnus alalunga), managed by the International Commission for the Conservation of Atlantic Tunas (ICCAT).
The MSE tests candidate management procedures against a range of plausible operating models to evaluate their performance against management objectives under uncertainty.
The MSE analysis uses the iccatSALB R package, developed for this purpose and built on the openMSE framework.

title: ICCAT Southern Atlantic Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation
text:
Materials

Trial Specifications Document: the operating models, management procedures, and performance metrics used in the MSE.
iccatSALB R package: R package implementing the MSE analysis, with full technical documentation.

title: ICCAT Southern Atlantic Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation
text:
Repository Structure
The iccatSALB repository is organised as follows:







Directory / File
Purpose




R/
Package functions and objects


analysis/
Analysis scripts that run the MSE


data-raw/
Conditioning output and other raw data used to build the package


objects/
Saved R objects produced by the analysis scripts (OM/, Hist/, etc.)


tsd/
Quarto source for the Trial Specifications Document


homepage/
Quarto source for this website



To reproduce the analysis, download the iccatSALB repository, install and load the iccatSALB package (e.g., pak::pak('blue-matter/iccatSALB; load('iccatSALB'))), and work through the scripts in analysis.
